creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from milojah <milojah@gmail.com> -----

Yes, but I got the silimage model number wrong.

It's 3512a.

If I stress the controller (dd if=/dev/acd1 of=/dev/null bs=512k) the
machine will hang before completion with the GENERIC kernel.

When I searched for 3512 I found an existing open bug for hangs, so I
assume it's a bad card.

I just ordered 2 more SATA controllers, a VIA chipset and a
jr-something. I am just trying to use some SATA DVD-Rs.

If you like, I can send you the silimage card, so you can test.

Thanks

----- End forwarded message -----
